**Analyzing strike announcement**

I need to identify if this document announces an upcoming strike. The content indicates there will be a national strike on Monday, September 22, for 24 hours, affecting public transport. It mentions a publication date of September 16, 2025, and an update on September 17, 2025. While the title mistakenly says 2026, the body confirms the strike is indeed set for September 22, 2025, indicating that this document announces an upcoming strike.
